ontology.title: SNAP Eligibility Legal Ontology (LRMoo-aligned)
ontology.description: Base ontology for modeling legal rules, concepts, and decisions in the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP).
ontology.alignment: Extends LRMoo (F1 Work, F2 Expression, F12 Nomen, E55 Type, E13 Attribute Assignment, E7 Activity)

SNAP_LegalWork.definition: Corpus or collection of SNAP statutes or regulations (e.g., CFR Title 7, MPP).

SNAP_LegalExpression.definition: Specific textual realization of a statute section (e.g., §273.9(a)).

SNAP_NormativeStatement.definition: Machine-interpretable legal rule derived from a statute section.

SNAP_LegalConcept.definition: Domain concept referenced by rules (Income, Residency, Citizenship, etc.).

SNAP_LegalDecision.definition: Outcome state of rule evaluation (Eligible, Ineligible, Pending, etc.).

SNAP_LegalFact.definition: Case-specific facts (ABox) that are evaluated against rules.

SNAP_NormApplication.definition: Process of applying a rule to facts to reach a decision.

citesExpression.description: Rule cites a specific statute Expression.

hasLegalConcept.description: Rule references one or more legal concepts.

evaluates.description: NormApplication evaluates a set of case facts.

violates.description: Case facts violate a specific rule.

compliesWith.description: Case facts comply with a specific rule.

hasText.description: Plain-language text of a statute section or rule.

hasLogic.description: Compact logic string for SMT reasoning (e.g., 'Implies(income > threshold, Not(eligible))').

conceptType.description: Datatype for concept values: Numeric / Categorical / Text / Boolean.

SNAP_LegalWork.title: SNAP Eligibility Regulations (CFR Title 7, MPP §63)
SNAP_LegalWork.definition: Top-level container for SNAP rules and expressions.
